message:
fix(messaging/session): guard normalize() against degenerate recursion infinite loop

Add cycle detection in RoleConformanceState::normalize() to prevent
infinite loops when a validated contract contains RecursePoint(L, Recurse(L))
— a degenerate empty recursion that passes contract validation but caused
the monitor to spin forever. Degenerate cycles now resolve to End.

Also adds fresh-eyes audit entries for batches 446-448: conformance.rs (1672L,
1 MEDIUM FIXED), mod.rs (24L, SOUND), once_cell.rs (1345L, SOUND),
reactor/browser.rs (1332L, SOUND), reactor/mod.rs (1302L, SOUND),
streaming.rs (1236L, SOUND), filter.rs (957L, SOUND), try_stream.rs (856L, SOUND).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
